languages.title: Jezik
languages.subtitle: Izberite jezik, ki se uporablja v aplikaciji.
languages.noResults: Noben jezik ne ustreza vašemu iskanju.

phone.label: Telefonska številka
phone.searchCountry: Poiščite državo, kodo ali predpono za klicanje
phone.noCountries: Nobena država se ne ujema z vašim iskanjem.
phone.invalid: Vnesite veljavno telefonsko številko za izbrano državo.

auth.onboardingTagline: Osebni varnostni spremljevalec za trenutke med "V redu sem" in "Potrebujem pomoč."
auth.createSubtitle: Izberite način prijave, da zaščitite svoj varnostni graf.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Prijave nismo mogli dokončati. Preverite povezavo in poskusite znova.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Uporaba lokalne razvojne seje. Native Google Sign-In deluje v razvojni različici.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Poveži zdaj ali nadaljuj in dodaj kasneje.
auth.northStarBody: VL01 nosljiva naprava lahko sproži varnostne tokove s tapkanjem in dolgimi pritiski.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Tvoj nežni varnostni spremljevalec na zemljevidu in v klicih.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear lahko pomaga pri domačem načinu, načinu skrbnika, nujnem načinu, klicih za izgovore in glasovni podpori.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Uporablja se za zemljevid, nevarne cone, varen prihod in SOS kontekst.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving zahteva lokacijo, da skrbniki razumejo, kje je potrebna pomoč. To lahko kasneje spremeniš v Nastavitvah.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Obvestila podpirajo prijave in nujne dogodke.
permissions.notificationsBody: Obvestila uporabljamo le za varnostna opozorila, nujne posodobitve in opomnike, ki jih omogočite.
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uporablja vašo lokacijo za varnostni zemljevid, nevarne cone, hitro deljenje in SOS kontekst. To lahko kasneje spremeniš v Nastavitvah.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving pošilja opomnike za prijavo, nujne posodobitve in varnostne opozorila, ki jih omogočite. Za oglase ne uporabljamo obvestil.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uporablja mikrofon le, ko začneš AI spremljevalca ali varnostni klic.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uporablja Bluetooth za povezovanje z NorthStar nakitom, prebiranje stanja povezave in varno delovanje sprožilcev iz nosljive naprave.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving uporablja fotoaparat le, ko se odločite narediti profilno fotografijo ali deliti varnostno fotografijo.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving ohranja ta potek dostopen iz nastavitev in nadzorne plošče.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Izberi spremljevalni glas, ki se ti zdi najbolj varen za slišati.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: Delite kontekst z zaupanja vrednimi ljudmi.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Pet tapov lahko eskalira v SOS in opozorila skrbnika.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Ustvari si prijazen razlog, da zapustiš neprijetno situacijo.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Začnite klic spremljevalca v realnem času, ko potrebujete podporo.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Preizkusite varnostne tokove v nizkotlačnem testu.

jewelry.noDevices: V bližini še niso našli nobenih bližnjih NorthStar naprav.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth skeniranje se ni moglo začeti. Prosim, poskusite znova.
jewelry.scanFailed: V bližini nakita nisva našla. Preveri Bluetooth, imej NorthStar blizu in poskusi znova.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth skeniranje se ni moglo začeti. Preverite Bluetooth dostop in poskusite znova.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Dostop bližnjih naprav je izklopljen. Dovoli Bluetooth dostop v Nastavitvah, nato poskusi znova.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar je trajalo predolgo, da sem se povezal. Premakni ga bližje in poskusi znova.
jewelry.connectFailed: Nismo se mogli povezati z NorthStar. Preveri, da je napolnjen in blizu, nato poskusi znova.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Naj NorthStar napolnjen in blizu tega telefona, nato ponovno skeniraj.

home.subtitle: Nadzorna plošča varnostnega spremljevalca
home.readyBody: Glas, zemljevid, nakit in varuhi so oddaljeni le en dotik.

map.title: Varnostni zemljevid
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go predogled; Mapbox se upodablja v razvojni različici.
map.updateFailed: Nismo mogli posodobiti vaše lokacije. Prosim, poskusite znova.
map.notRequested: Dostop do lokacije ni bil zahtevan. Kasneje ga lahko omogočite v Nastavitvah.
map.permissionOff: Dostop do lokacije je izklopljen. Omogočite ga v nastavitvah, da se varnostni zemljevid osredotoči na vas.
map.timeout: Vaša lokacija traja dlje, kot smo pričakovali. Premakni se nekam z jasnejšim signalom in poskusi znova.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Zaupanja vredna mesta, ki jih shranite, se bodo tukaj prikazala za hiter dostop.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Varno se povežeš s svojim glasovnim spremljevalcem...
safetyCall.reconnect: Ponovno se povežite z glasovno AI
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Začnite klic ali napišite sporočilo, ko boste pripravljeni.

history.clearMessage: To odstrani shranjena AI spremljevalna sporočila s te naprave.
history.title: Zgodovina pogovorov
history.subtitle: AI spremljevalna sporočila shranjena na tej napravi.
history.emptyMessage: Vaši AI spremljevalni pogovori se bodo pojavili tukaj po prvem klicu.
history.loadFailed: Nismo mogli naložiti zgodovine pogovorov. Prosim, poskusite znova.
history.clearFailed: Nismo mogli izbrisati zgodovine pogovorov. Prosim, poskusite znova.
history.deleteFailed: Tega pogovora nismo mogli izbrisati. Prosim, poskusite znova.

voices.title: Moji varnostni klici
voices.subtitle: Izberite spremljevalni glas, ki se vam zdi pravi za slišanje.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Tega glasovnega vzorca ni bilo mogoče predvajati. Prosim, poskusite znova.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Uporabite priložene spremljevalne odgovore, kadar omrežje ali Hume poverilnice niso na voljo.
settings.privacyBody: Izvozite ali izbrišite lokalne podatke, shranjene na tej napravi.
settings.exportFailedMessage: Trenutno ne morem izvoziti vaših podatkov.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: To odstrani vaš profil, nastavitve, nujne kontakte, zgodovino pogovorov, opomnike za dovoljenja in lokalno avtentikacijo s te naprave.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Trenutno ne morem izbrisati lokalnih podatkov.

sections.languageSubtitle: Jezik za vmesnik in sistemska dovoljenja
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, skrbniki in kontakti za nujne primere

settings.updateFailedMessage: Te preference nismo mogli rešiti. Prosim, poskusite znova.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Tvoja seja je še vedno aktivna. Prosim, poskusite znova.

contacts.title: Nujni kontakti
contacts.subtitle: Zaupanja vredni ljudje so na voljo med varnostnimi tokovi.
contacts.name: Ime
contacts.empty: Za nujne primere še ni bilo dodanih kontaktov.
contacts.emptyMessage: Dodajte nekoga, ki mu zaupate, da bo pripravljen, ko bo varnostni tok potreben.
contacts.removeMessage: Ta oseba se ne bo več pojavila v vašem nujnem postopku.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Tega stika nismo mogli rešiti. Preverite podrobnosti in poskusite znova.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Tega stika nismo mogli odstraniti. Prosim, poskusite znova.

friends.title: Prijatelji
friends.subtitle: Varuhi, zahteve in graf za nujne primere.
friends.emptyMessage: Zaupanja vredni prijatelji in skrbniki se bodo tukaj pojavili, ko bodo dodani.

emergency.title: Nujni SOS
emergency.subtitle: Stopnjujte le, ko potrebujete takojšnjo podporo.
emergency.body: To bo obvestilo vaš varnostni tok in pripravilo stike za nujne primere.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Prispevek o deljenju lokacije je pripravljen. Povežite backend share endpoint za pošiljanje živih povezav.

capybearTap.title: Capybear pipa
capybearTap.subtitle: Dvakrat pritisnite NorthStar, da spustite varnostno pomarančo.
capybearTap.body: Gesture pot je pripravljena za ožičenje BLE dogodkov.

errors.voiceOffline: Zdi se, da si offline. Vaše sporočilo bo poslano, ko se ponovno povežete.
errors.voiceQueued: Sporočilo shranjeno. Poslan bo, ko se glasovni spremljevalec ponovno poveže.
errors.voiceConnecting: Varno se povežeš s svojim glasovnim spremljevalcem...
errors.microphone: Za glasovne klice je potreben dostop do mikrofona. To lahko omogočite v Nastavitvah ali pa namesto tega napišete sporočilo.
errors.billing: Spletni glasovni spremljevalec je začasno nedosegljiv. Lahko nadaljujete z offline spremljevalcem.
errors.authentication: Glasovni spremljevalec ni mogel potrditi te seje. Ponovno se prijavite ali za zdaj uporabite spremljevalca brez povezave.
errors.timeout: Glasovni spremljevalec je predolgo odlašal z odgovorom. Preverite povezavo in poskusite znova.
errors.network: Nismo mogli doseči glasovnega spremljevalca. Preverite povezavo, nato poskusite znova ali nadaljujte brez povezave.
errors.genericVoice: Nekaj je prekinilo glasovni klic. Poskusite znova ali nadaljujte z offline spremljevalcem.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving potrebuje dostop do mikrofona za varnost in AI klice spremljevalcev.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving uporablja vašo lokacijo za varnostni zemljevid in bližnje varnostne funkcije.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving uporablja Bluetooth za povezavo z vašim NorthStar varnostnim nakitom.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Ta možnost prijave v tej različici ni na voljo.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Nadaljuj v predstavitvenem načinu (samo za razvoj)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Predstavitveni način uporablja samo lokalne lažne podatke. Povezane storitve niso preverjene, seja pa se ponastavi ob ponovnem nalaganju aplikacije.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Koda za preverjanje ni veljavna ali je potekla. Zahtevajte novo kodo in poskusite znova.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Preveč poskusov prijave. Počakajte trenutek in poskusite znova.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Preverjanje prijave je trajalo predolgo. Preverite povezavo in poskusite znova.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Storitve za prijavo ni bilo mogoče doseči. Preverite povezavo in poskusite znova.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Vaša seja je potekla. Znova se prijavite.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Varnostnega zemljevida ni bilo mogoče naložiti. Preverite povezavo in poskusite znova.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Lokacija v živo ni na voljo. Prikazana je vaša zadnja shranjena lokacija iz %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Vaše lokacije ni bilo mogoče deliti. Preverite dostop do lokacije in poskusite znova.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Tukaj je moja lokacija, zabeležena ob %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Tukaj je moja zadnja shranjena lokacija, zabeležena ob %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Dostop do Bluetooth je izklopljen. Omogočite ga v nastavitvah in poskusite znova.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth je izklopljen. Vklopite ga in poskusite znova.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Seznanjanje prek Bluetooth v tej napravi ali različici ni na voljo.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Naprave NorthStar ni bilo mogoče najti. Imejte jo v bližini, preverite Bluetooth in poskusite znova.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: V bližini ni bilo najdenih naprav NorthStar. Imejte jo v bližini in znova zaženite iskanje.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Z napravo NorthStar se ni bilo mogoče povezati. Poskrbite, da je napolnjena in v bližini, nato poskusite znova.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Tega mesta ni bilo mogoče shraniti. Poskusite znova.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Telefonska številčnica je odprta; klic ni potrjen.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Stik za nujne primere ni bil na voljo; klic ni bil opravljen.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Telefonske številčnice ni bilo mogoče odpreti; klic ni bil opravljen.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Zadnjega poskusa SOS ni bilo mogoče potrditi.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Glasovni spremljevalec trenutno ni na voljo. Poskusite znova pozneje ali nadaljujte s spremljevalcem brez povezave.
releaseCritical.contactUpdated: Stik za nujne primere je posodobljen.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
